name: Minimal Strip Footer
description: A single-line site-bottom strip — brand mark, copyright, optional inline legal links, and a small row of social icons. Restrained, calm, takes up minimal vertical space. The right footer when the rest of the page already does the heavy storytelling lifting.

descriptions.descriptive: One stretched flex row on desktop with three slots: logo + copyright on the left, optional legal links in the center, and a row of social icon buttons on the right. Collapses to a centered three-line stack below md:. Two visual tones — `neutral` (bg-neutral / neutral-content text, the default) or `subtle` (bg-base-100 with a hairline top border). No newsletter, no sitemap — only what the page minimally needs to legally close out.
descriptions.usage: Use as the site-wide footer for portfolio sites, agency one-pagers, single-product launch pages, or any layout where a closing CTA section already exists above. Don't pair with FooterMega/FooterPulse/FooterReveal — pick exactly one footer per generated site.
descriptions.audienceFit: Design studios, freelancers, photographers, single-page launch sites, and any brand whose visual identity is already strong enough that the footer's job is to disappear into it.
